entry.data:
CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH IN THE EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
